sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78891" key="parasxoi/nisma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρασχοίν-ισμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n78891.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cord drawn beside</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">along</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:160" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.160</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
